body_text:
24:25 â July 15, 2024
Update to the Wires Part
We added content to the Wires Part related to outgoing wires now being monitored in âdecision modeâ in the Enterprise Fraud Management (EFM) system.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Wires Part
Section 1.1, Overview of Wires
We added a note that outgoing wires identified as potential fraud are managed by authorized users in Enterprise Fraud Management (EFM).
Section 2.1, Definitions
We added a definition for Enterprise Fraud Management.
Section 3.3, Establishing Policies and Procedures for Outgoing Wires Monitored in Enterprise Fraud Management (EFM)
New section.
Section 14.5, Outgoing Wires Monitored in Enterprise Fraud Management (EFM)
New section.
Section 23.1, Overview of Cancelling Outgoing Wires
We added information related to the status of outgoing wires in the Wires application for wires identified as potential fraud or fraud in EFM.
Section 24.2
,
Routing Instructions for Incoming Wires
We updated the section to note that incoming wires that are missing identifiers will be returned to the sending financial institution.
Section 26.2, Settlement of Outgoing Wires
We added information related to the settlement of wires under investigation for sanction list matches and wires that are identified as potential fraud or fraud in EFM.
